query_texts:
CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX cci_archive
    ON [dbo].[pfor_archive]
    WITH (DATA_COMPRESSION = COLUMNSTORE_ARCHIVE, MAXDOP = 1)

CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX cci_plain
    ON [dbo].[pfor_plain]
    WITH (DATA_COMPRESSION = COLUMNSTORE, MAXDOP = 1)

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (200000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[pfor_archive] (id, v_none, v_sparse, v_deep, v_compulsory, v_dense)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CAST(n % 1000 AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n % 1009 = 0 THEN 2000000000
              ELSE n % 65536 END AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n = 100001 THEN 2000000000
              ELSE n % 1024 END AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n % 5000 = 0 THEN 1000000000
              ELSE n % 8 END AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n % 11 = 0 THEN 1000000000 + (n % 7)
              ELSE n % 32 END AS INT)
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (200000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[pfor_plain] (id, v_none, v_sparse, v_deep, v_compulsory, v_dense)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CAST(n % 1000 AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n % 1009 = 0 THEN 2000000000
              ELSE n % 65536 END AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n = 100001 THEN 2000000000
              ELSE n % 1024 END AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n % 5000 = 0 THEN 1000000000
              ELSE n % 8 END AS INT),
    CAST(CASE WHEN n % 11 = 0 THEN 1000000000 + (n % 7)
              ELSE n % 32 END AS INT)
FROM nums
